{{Quote|Over the centuries, many of the Koon family have been Baran Do. The Force runs strong in that line, as, it is said, in the Skywalker line.|[[Tila Mong]]|<ref name="Fate of the Jedi: Outcast">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Outcast]]''</ref>}}
The '''Koon family''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Kel Dor/Legends|Kel Dor]] family from [[Dorin/Legends|Dorin]]. Over many centuries, many became respected members of the [[Baran Do]], as noted by [[Master of the Order (Baran Do)|Mistress]] [[Tila Mong]]. In addition, at least three members of the family were [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]: [[Jedi Council/Legends|Council]] member [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]],<ref name="Fate of the Jedi: Outcast" /> his [[Plo Koon's uncle|uncle]], and Plo's niece, [[Sha Koon|Sha]].<ref name="SW 39">[[Star Wars (1998) 39|''Star Wars'' (1998) 39]]</ref>
